race.description: Alabar Farms Gold Tiara Final Pace (G1)
race.comment: BIRDSONG (9) has been setting the mark in the early juvenile fillies races with easy wins in her three starts at this circuit and distance, cruising home by more than 23m in last week's heat. Draws on the back row but came from that barrier when scoring nicely two back. With even luck she can maintain her perfect record. SOHO ASTER (4) made an immediate impression when she worked forward from a couple of spots wider to lead and win on debut in last week's heat. Will only be better for that hitout and should be able to take advantage of the good draw. SHES A DELANEY (12) may require some luck from her draw on the outside of the back row but she was impressive in a 15m win in her heat, taking her record at this circuit and distance to two from two. GUNNAREASON (10) came from this row when winning last week and has scope for further improvement while LATHER ME UP (6) was runner up despite breaking in her heat and has won a trial since.
